title: The Lab Falls Apart
description: On pages 1–4, this part follows Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is the lab falls apart.
scene: The scene focuses on the lab falls apart, with Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Everything Caesar has said is a lie!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's brown- beard!! What's he talking about?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Brown- beard is right below us

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: DOWN ON THE FIRST FLOOR OF R-BLOCK!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Brownbeard, what the hell happened to you!!

summary: The Lab Falls Apart. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
